
                BIMLab DynLock - Huong Dan SU DUNG CONG CU


 TONG QUAN NHANH


Chuoi hoat dong:

   Mo Revit
     
   Bấm nut "Run Tool" (tab BIMLab)
     
   Chon cong cu tu danh sach
     
   Nhap thong so
     
   Bấm "Chạy"
     
   Ket qua hien thi trong model

    Thoi gian: 30 giay - 2 phut (tuy cong cu)



  CHI TIET TUNG BUOC


BUOC 1: MO REVIT


1. Bap dup chuot vao Revit (hoac chay tu Start Menu)
2. Chon: File -> Open -> Project
3. Tim file dung (.rvt) -> Open
4. Cho file load xong (1-2 phut)


BUOC 2: TIM NUT "RUN TOOL"


Sau khi Revit mo xong:

1. Nhin vao Ribbon (dong cong cu duoi cung)
2. Tim tab "BIMLab" (mau xanh duong)
   OK Neu thay -> Addin da cai OK
   OK Neu khong thay -> Xem "KHAC PHUC LOI"

3. Trong tab BIMLab, tim nut "Run Tool"
   - Bieu tuong: khoa 
   - Van ban: "Run" va "Tool"

4. Bap CLICK vao nut nay


BUOC 3: CHON CONG CU


Cua so se hien: "BIMLab DynLock Tools"

1. Danh sach cong cu se hien o phia trai
   Vi du:
    Coc_v1.2
    Tuong_chieu
    Canh quan_01
    ...

2. Click chon cong cu ban can
   -> Se duoc highlight (xanh duong)

3. Bấm nut "Chon"
   (Hoac double-click truc tiep tren cong cu)

    MEO:
   - Danh sach trong? -> Bấm "Mo file khac..." de chon file .dynx khac
   - Cong cu khong thay? -> Bao Team Lead gui lai


BUOC 4: NHAP THONG SO


Form se hien ra voi cac o nhap lieu.
Cac o khac nhau tuy cong cu:

   OA NHAP VAN BAN (Text Box):
  
  - O trong co nen trang
  - Click vao -> go van ban
  - Vi du: Ten layer tu CAD
  
  Cach nhap:
  1. Click vao o
  2. Xóa text cu (Ctrl+A -> Delete)
  3. Go text moi
  4. Tab hoac Enter de chuyen o tiep theo


   OA NHAP SO (Number Box):
  
  - Chi nhap so (co the co dau phay)
  - Vi du: Do day: 100 hoac 2.5
  
  Cach nhap:
  1. Click vao o
  2. Xóa so cu
  3. Go so moi
  
   LUU Y:
  - Dung dau cham "." lam phan tach thap phan (khong dung dau phay)
  - Vi du: 10.5 (DUNG) / 10,5 (SAI)


   OA TICK BOX (Checkbox):
  
  - Co cac o nho de check/uncheck
  - Click vao de ON/OFF
  - Vi du: "Tu dong luu file?", "Xóa layer cu?"
  
  Cach dung:
  1. Click vao o nho
  2. OK Tick = BAT
  3.  Khong tick = TAT


   OA CHON (Dropdown / Combo Box):
  
  - O co mui ten  o phia phai
  - Click vao -> hien danh sach
  - Vi du: Chon Level, Family Type
  
  Cach dung:
  1. Click vao o hoac mui ten 
  2. Danh sach se xuat hien
  3. Click chon mot muc
  4. Muc duoc chon se hien trong o
  
   MEO:
  - Danh sach rat dai? -> Go chu dau de tim nhanh
  - Vi du: Go "L" de tim "Level" truoc


   OA CHON ELEMENT (Pick Selection):
  
  - O chi xem (khong the nhap)
  - Co nut "Chon" canh ben
  - Vi du: Chon CAD, chon cac doi tuong
  
  Cach dung:
  1. Bấm nut "Chon" canh o
  2. Quay lai cua so Revit
  3. Click chuot vao cac doi tuong can chon
     - 1 lan = chon 1 doi tuong
     - Nhieu lan = chon nhieu doi tuong
  4. Sau khi chon xong -> Nhan ENTER
  5. Quay lai form, o se hien: "OK Da chon N doi tuong"
  
   LUU Y:
  - Neu chon sai -> Bấm ESC de huy, chon lai
  - Phai chon tren nhung gi that su ve (khong chon trong)
  - Neu khong chon gi -> Se dung lua chon cu tu lan truoc


BUOC 5: NHAP XONG -> BAM "CHAY"


1. Kiem tra lai tat ca thong so:
   OK Cac o bat buoc da dien?
   OK So lieu nhap co dung khong?
   OK Cac lua chon da chon?

2. Bấm nut "Chạy" (xanh duong, o phia duoi phai)

3. Che do "dang xu ly" se hien
   - Form se lock (khong the thay doi)
   - Revit se "khong hoi dap" (binh thuong)
   - Cho, dung bam gi ca

4.  Thoi gian cho: 5 giay - 2 phut
   (Tuy do phuc tap cua cong cu)

5.  Khi xong:
   - Form se tu dong dong
   - Quay lai cua so Revit
   - Kiem tra model -> se thay ket qua


BUOC 6: KIEM TRA KET QUA


1. Nhin vao model Revit

2. Cac doi tuong moi duoc tao?
   - Coc moi? Tuong moi? Chieu cao moi?
   - Hien thi dung vi tri khong?

3.  Neu OK:
   - Thanh cong!
   - Co the save file hoac chay cong cu khac

4.  Neu co van de:
   - Xem phan "KHAC PHUC LOI"
   - Hoac hoi Team Lead



  UNDO / REDO - HOAN TAC & REDO


Neu ket qua khong OK:

HOAN TAC (Undo):
  - Bấm Ctrl+Z
  - Hoac: Edit -> Undo
  - Cac doi tuong vua tao se bi xoa

REDO (Lap lai):
  - Bấm Ctrl+Y
  - Hoac: Edit -> Redo
  - Doi tuong se xuat hien tro lai

 TINH NANG:
  - Ban co the undo/redo binh thuong
  - DynLock khong "khoa" chuc nang nay



  CHAY CONG CU KHAC (TUAN TU)


Muon chay cong cu thu 2, 3, 4...?

1. Tu ket qua cong cu thu nhat
2. Bấm nut "Run Tool" lai (tab BIMLab)
3. Chon cong cu khac -> Nhap thong so -> Chạy
4. Lap lai nhieu lan tuy y

 LUU Y:
  - Chạy tung cai mot (mot luc)
  - Chạy xong cai 1 moi chay cai 2
  - Neu chay trung luc -> co the gay loi



  SAVE FILE DUNG


Sau khi chay cong cu, ban can save:

  File -> Save
  Hoac: Ctrl+S

 GOI Y:
  - Save thuong xuyen (cu moi 10-15 phut)
  - Neu muon giu ban cu -> "Save As" (luu voi ten khac)
  - Backup truoc khi chay cong cu moi



  KHAC PHUC LOI THUONG GAP


 TINH HUONG 1: Cong cu bao loi sau khi chay


Co the xay ra:
   Thong so nhap sai
   Du lieu trong CAD khong hop le
   Package thieu
   Loi Dynamo

Cach xu ly:
  1. Bấm OK tren thong bao loi
  2. Ghi nho noi dung loi
  3. Undo (Ctrl+Z) de quay lai
  4. Bao Team Lead: "Lỗi: [noi dung]"


 TINH HUONG 2: Cong cu khong tao gi ca


Nguyen nhan:
  - Thong so de trong hoac sai
  - Script thieu du lieu de xu ly
  - Can chon element nhung khong chon

Cach xu ly:
  1. Kiem tra lai thong so
  2. Dac biet: o "Chon element" -> phai bap "Chon" va click vao doi tuong
  3. Thu lai


 TINH HUONG 3: Cong cu chay rat lau (>3 phut)


Cach xu ly:
  1. Cho 3-5 phut nua (neu du lieu rat lon)
  2. Neu van khong xong:
     -> Bấm ESC hoac Close cua so
     -> Hoac Ctrl+Alt+Delete -> Task Manager -> End Task (Revit)
  3. Mo Revit lai -> Undo cong cu


 TINH HUONG 4: Tab "BIMLab" khong hien


Cach xu ly:
  1. Xem "HUONG_DAN_NHAN_VIEN.txt" phan Khac Phuc Loi
  2. Lien he Team Lead



  MEO & KINH NGHIEM


OK Lam viec hieu qua:
  - Mo file dung truoc -> roi chay cong cu
  - Save thuong xuyen
  - Backup file quan trong
  - Chạy cong cu khi may yen tinh (khong chay may khac)

OK Chon element (Pick):
  - Click chinh xac tren doi tuong
  - Neu sai -> ESC -> Chon lai
  - Khi finish -> phai nhan ENTER

OK Thong so:
  - Ghi lai thong so cong cu lan dau
  - Lan sau co the nhap lai (giong nhau)
  - Copy tu tung lan truoc neu can

OK Khi co loi:
  - Ghi nho thong bao loi chinh xac
  - Bao Team Lead kem anh chup man hinh
  - Cung cap thong so ban nhap (neu co)



  TONG TAT NHANH



 QUYEN NHANH: SAU KHI DA CAI (moi lan dung)                                 
                                                                             
 1. Mo Revit + file dung                                                    
 2. Tab BIMLab -> "Run Tool"                                                 
 3. Chon cong cu                                                            
 4. Nhap thong so                                                           
 5. Bấm "Chạy"                                                              
 6. Cho ket qua                                                             
 7. Save file (Ctrl+S)                                                      
                                                                             
  Thoi gian: 1-2 phut                                                      




          Cam on vi su dung BIMLab DynLock!
          Moi thac mac -> Lien he Team Lead
